name: Mancozeb 75% WP
description: Broad-spectrum protective fungicide effective against a wide range of fungal diseases. Contact action with multi-site mode of action.

why_recommended.tomato_late_blight: Mancozeb disrupts multiple metabolic processes in Phytophthora infestans, preventing spore germination. Safe to use up to 7 days before harvest.
why_recommended.tomato_early_blight: Highly effective against Alternaria species. Apply at first sign of disease for best results.
why_recommended.potato_late_blight: Proven efficacy against Phytophthora. Apply preventively every 7-10 days during wet weather.
why_recommended.corn_common_rust: Protects leaf surface from Puccinia spore penetration.
why_recommended.wheat_leaf_rust: Standard protective treatment for rust diseases in wheat.

name: Copper Oxychloride 50% WP
description: Copper-based broad-spectrum fungicide and bactericide. Protects against downy mildews, blights, leaf spots and bacterial diseases.

why_recommended.tomato_late_blight: Copper ions are toxic to Phytophthora spores on contact. Best applied before rain forecast.
why_recommended.potato_late_blight: Effective preventive and early curative treatment. Copper builds a protective barrier on leaf surface.
why_recommended.rice_blast: Copper reduces spore load on leaf surfaces and prevents new infections.
why_recommended.tomato_early_blight: Good contact activity against Alternaria on leaf surfaces.

name: Metalaxyl + Mancozeb 8+64% WP
description: Combination systemic + contact fungicide. Metalaxyl moves inside the plant to kill the pathogen while Mancozeb provides surface protection. Best for severe infections.

why_recommended.tomato_late_blight: The metalaxyl component penetrates infected tissue and kills Phytophthora systemically. Ideal for moderate to severe infections.
why_recommended.potato_late_blight: Gold standard treatment for late blight in potatoes. Curative action within 72 hours of application.
why_recommended.rice_blast: Systemic activity provides protection and cure for active blast infections.

name: Cold-Pressed Neem Oil 3000 PPM
description: 100% organic cold-pressed neem oil. Controls fungal diseases, pests and nematodes. Safe for humans, animals and beneficial insects when used correctly.

why_recommended.tomato_late_blight: Neem oil coats leaf surfaces, preventing Phytophthora spore germination. Safe near harvest. Best for mild infections or as a preventive spray.
why_recommended.tomato_early_blight: Azadirachtin disrupts fungal growth. Excellent as a preventive spray during high-humidity periods.
why_recommended.potato_late_blight: Organic option for farmers following natural farming practices. Best combined with cultural practices.
why_recommended.corn_common_rust: Effective as a preventive treatment. Apply early morning for best results.
why_recommended.rice_blast: Organic management for mild blast. Most effective as a preventive measure.
why_recommended.wheat_leaf_rust: Preventive organic option. Best combined with resistant varieties.

dosage: 5ml per litre of water with 2ml soap solution as emulsifier

name: Chlorothalonil 75% WP
description: Multi-site contact fungicide with broad-spectrum activity. Low resistance risk due to multi-site mode of action. Excellent for alternating with systemic fungicides.

why_recommended.tomato_early_blight: Chlorothalonil is the most effective contact fungicide against Alternaria early blight. Apply every 7 days during peak disease pressure.
why_recommended.corn_common_rust: Protects all leaf surfaces from Puccinia spore infection. Apply at first sign of pustules.

name: Propiconazole 25% EC
description: Triazole systemic fungicide absorbed by leaves and stems. Moves upward (acropetally) within the plant. Provides both curative and preventive control of important fungal diseases.

why_recommended.tomato_early_blight: Systemic action reaches all plant parts. Highly effective once disease has established on multiple leaves.
why_recommended.corn_common_rust: Triazoles are the gold standard for rust control. Provide 2-3 weeks of protection.
why_recommended.rice_blast: Propiconazole effectively controls leaf blast and neck blast when applied at panicle emergence.
why_recommended.wheat_leaf_rust: Most effective class of fungicides for wheat rust diseases. Apply when first pustules appear.

name: Trifloxystrobin 25% + Tebuconazole 50% WG
description: Premium combination fungicide with two modes of action. Trifloxystrobin (strobilurin) + Tebuconazole (triazole) provides excellent systemic protection with long residual activity.

why_recommended.corn_common_rust: Dual-mode combination provides knockdown and persistent protection. Single application can protect for 3-4 weeks.
why_recommended.wheat_leaf_rust: The most effective treatment available for severe rust infections. Tebuconazole component provides rapid disease knockdown.

name: Tricyclazole 75% WP
description: Specific systemic fungicide for rice blast management. Absorbed rapidly and translocated within the plant. Recommended product by ICAR for blast control.

why_recommended.rice_blast: Tricyclazole is the most specific and effective fungicide against Magnaporthe oryzae. Inhibits melanin biosynthesis in the fungus, preventing penetration into rice cells. Apply at tillering and panicle initiation stages.
